title: Material Standard Reference
description: Schema for a standards reference record. Captures ASTM and other test method citations used to define material properties. Citation only — no copyrighted text.

reference_id.description: Unique identifier for this standards reference.

standard_id.description: Standard designation (e.g., ASTM D6878, ASTM E96, UL 790).

applicability.description: What this standard measures, defines, or classifies.

test_method.description: Specific test procedure within a multi-part standard, if applicable.
